title: UX Researcher
description: Zendesk is seeking a UX Researcher to uncover customer insights that shape product direction. You'll conduct user interviews, analyze usage data, and translate findings into actionable design recommendations. Work onsite in Omaha for a company building software that improves customer service worldwide.
responsibilities: Conduct user interviews and usability testing sessions
Analyze user behavior data and identify patterns
Create research reports and visualizations for stakeholders
Collaborate with design and product teams on findings
Develop research methodologies and testing frameworks

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Psychology, HCI, Design, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
On-site office in Omaha with collaborative culture
